order = record.sale_order_ids[0] record.action_update_room_measurements([ { "room_id":9, "material_id":218, "room_name":"LIVING ROOM", "transitions":[ { "name":"No Transition", "width":4 } ], "room_adjusted_area":"224.0", "room_perimeter":60, "room_comments":"House is under remodel. "Attachment9RLw4EHC1X.JPG" ], "moulding_type":"NO MOLDING" }
], order)

for appointment in records: sale_order = appointment.sale_order_ids[0] log('appointment %s'%(appointment.id)) appointment.action_generate_contract_document_manually() model_id = model.env['ir.model'].search([('model', '=', 'sale.order')], limit=1) sign_request = model.env['otl_document_sign.request'].sudo().search( [('model_id', '=', model_id.id), ('res_id', '=', sale_order.id)], order='create_date desc', limit=1) if sign_request:
if sign_request.state == 'signed': if not sign_request.completed_document: sign_request.generate_completed_document() contract_doc_attachment = sign_request.document_image() sale_order.write( {'contract_doc_attachment_id': contract_doc_attachment.id, 'document_signed': True})
Re-Generate Contract Document Manually & Send to i360
for appn in records: appn.write({'customer_name': '%s, %s' % (appn.applicant_last_name, appn.applicant_first_name)})
